steps.title: Set up the ratio relationship
steps.content: The ratio of $XY$ to $ZV$ is \$6$ to \$1$, which means $XY$ is \$6$ times as long as $ZV$. We can express this as: $$XY = 6 \cdot ZV$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve for ZV
steps.content: Substituting $XY = 102$ inches: $$102 = 6 \cdot ZV$$ Dividing both sides by \$6$: $$ZV = \frac{102}{6} = 17$$ The length of line segment $ZV$ is \$17$ inches. That matches choice A — A is correct.
